title: euphrasia insignis var. insignis
intro: Euphrasia insignis var. insignis, also known as the eye bright or eyebright, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular choice for treating eye problems, such as conjunctivitis and blepharitis, as well as respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Euphrasia insignis var. insignis include soothing and protecting the eyes, reducing inflammation and promoting healing, while also providing relief from coughs and congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to make teas, eye washes, and salves that are beneficial for treating various eye and respiratory conditions.
